heading: Agreements with Federal and State agencies
label: 1863 Agreements with Federal and State agencies
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days from , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 14, 1983section 524 of Pub. L. 97–470section 1801 of this title

children.heading: Scope of agreements
children.label: a Scope of agreements
children.text: The Secretary may enter into agreements with Federal and State agencies (1) to use their facilities and services, (2) to delegate, subject to subsection (b), to Federal and State agencies such authority, other than rulemaking, as may be useful in carrying out this chapter, and (3) to allocate or transfer funds to, or otherwise pay or reimburse, such agencies for expenses incurred pursuant to agreements under clause (1) or (2) of this section.

children.heading: Delegation of authority pursuant to written State plan
children.label: b Delegation of authority pursuant to written State plan

children.text: shall include a description of the functions to be performed, the methods of performing such functions, and the resources to be devoted to the performance of such functions; and

provides assurances satisfactory to the Secretary that the State agency will comply with its description under paragraph (1) and that the State agency’s performance of functions so delegated will be at least comparable to the performance of such functions by the Department of Labor.
